subTitle: Chaitanya Charan, a monk, mentor and spiritual author, delivers a discourse on how one can incorporate the teachings of the Bhagavad Gita in their daily life.

title: Joy of Krishna Consciousness
subTitle: Religious leaders and devotees sing devotional songs and offer their sincere prayers to Lord Krishna, seeking his divine blessings.

title: Gita Parayan
subTitle: A religious scholar recites verses from the Holy Bhagavad Gita so that the devotees understand the universal teachings of Lord Krishna.

title: Mangal Aarti Iskcon Vrindavan
subTitle: Hindu devotees gather at the ISKCON Temple in Vrindavan to perform a religious ritual to worship Lord Krishna and feel connected with the Almighty.

title: Mangal Aarti Iskcon Chowpatty
subTitle: Hindu priests and devotees come together to perform a religious ritual and seek blessings of the Almighty at a sacred destination.

title: Tulsi Aarti & Japa
subTitle: A devotional hymn honours Goddess Tulsi, revered as Lord Vishnu's devoted worshipper, offering praise and seeking her divine blessings.

title: Sri Narasimha Mantra Dhyan
subTitle: A recital of the Narasimha Mantra, one of the most powerful mantras believed to protect the devotees from all kinds of evils, is played.

title: Gita Paath
subTitle: A religious scholar reads out verses from the Bhagavad Gita and explains their significance and meaning to help devotees understand.

title: Sringar Aarti Iskcon Juhu
subTitle: Hindu priests and devotees come together to perform a religious ritual and seek blessings of the Almighty at the ISKCON temple in Juhu.

title: Karma Yog
subTitle: A religious leader delivers a discourse on various teachings and principles from ancient Hindu scriptures and encourages followers to reflect on the same.
